---
title: "Week 7"
subtitle: "Trip Distribution"
---

## Prepare

📖 Read notes on [Trip Distribution](/teaching/CIVE461/supplemental/trip-distribution.html)

## Participate

None

## Practice

✍️ [GP 1 - Trip Generation](/teaching/CIVE461/project/project-description.html#report-1) - Submit on Canvas

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/teaching/ENCI707/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
